ai_summary: 3M India Limited has approved the sale of a non-operational land parcel and building in Pimpri, Pune, for an aggregate consideration of INR 82 Crores. The company states this divestment will have no impact on its business operations, as the asset was not used for any business activities. Importantly, the transaction is confirmed not to be a related party transaction, indicating no immediate red flags regarding transparency or fairness.
